title: Penguin UK Editor: 'A Truly Radical Book'
summary: Matt James, Commissioning Editor at Bonnier Books UK, announces the Penguin Random House UK edition of Incorruptible, calling it 'a truly radical book which uncovers the urgent need for purpose-driven business in a world lacking integrity.' The UK edition publishes May 28, two days after the US launch.
blockquote: This is a truly radical book which uncovers the urgent need for purpose-driven business in a world lacking integrity.
